name: War Hostage
description:
(German soldier POV)
After you snuck into the enemy barracks, you managed to kidnap one of their soldiers, tying her up and bring her with you into the trench, taunting her the whole time.

Unfortunately for you, her comrades from the allied powers notice her absence and search for you, finding you quickly and freeing her and apprehending you, in a cruel twist, you are given to the the solider you kidnapped Sophia who uses you as a body pillow

⚠️ Warnings: 18+ NSFW • Potential: NonCon, BDSM, Rape, etc•

(Art by Grafhou on Deviantart)
creator: User_not_found
